description: woodland - the giant in the outdoor shoe industry, has come up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. A cheeky take on the classic penny loafer, this four-hole lace up suede shoe also references the conservative derby in its styling. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with a rugged belt. Upper Two tone leather upper with aggressive stitch detailing and embossed branding on the lateral side of the heel Stitches on the seams of the toe box Four-hole lace ups Padded tongue Padded insole for in-step comfort Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Outsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel Midsole Rubber midsole Outsole Dual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not machine wash
